---
title: "Build Data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
source("source.R")
```

## Load raw data

```{r}
# load Germany survey data
DE <- read_csv("data_GER.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  readr::type_convert()
```

```{r}
# load US/GB survey data
US_GB <- read_csv("data_GB_US.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  readr::type_convert()
```

## Load item dictionary

```{r}
items <- read_delim("dalia_vars.csv", delim = ";", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    # keep topic + concept as machine-readable strings
    topic   = tolower(trimws(as.character(topic))),
    concept = tolower(trimws(as.character(concept))),

    # keep concept_summary only as a label (DO NOT overwrite concept)
    concept_summary = trimws(as.character(concept_summary)),
    concept_label   = dplyr::coalesce(dplyr::na_if(concept_summary, ""), concept),

    # canonical item names
    item = janitor::make_clean_names(trimws(as.character(item)))
  )

# Guardrails: surveys must match dictionary row count
stopifnot(ncol(DE) == nrow(items))
stopifnot(ncol(US_GB) == nrow(items))
```

## Rename columns and merge

```{r}
names(DE)    <- items$item
names(US_GB) <- items$item

data_all <- bind_rows(DE, US_GB)
```

## Recode country

```{r}
if (!("country_code" %in% names(data_all))) {
  stop("country_code column not found in data_all")
}

data_all <- data_all %>%
  mutate(
    country_code = toupper(as.character(country_code)),
    country_code = recode(country_code, "DE" = "GER", "UK" = "GB"),
    country_code = factor(country_code, levels = c("GER", "GB", "US"))
  )
```

## Define item groups

```{r}
accept_service_vars <- items %>% filter(topic == "acceptability_service")    %>% pull(item)
accept_info_vars    <- items %>% filter(topic == "acceptability_information") %>% pull(item)
accept_data_vars    <- items %>% filter(topic == "acceptability_data")        %>% pull(item)

acceptability_vars <- c(accept_service_vars, accept_info_vars, accept_data_vars)

privacy_vars <- "concern_privacy"

stopifnot(length(acceptability_vars) > 0)
stopifnot(all(acceptability_vars %in% names(data_all)))
stopifnot(all(privacy_vars %in% names(data_all)))
```

## Ordered factors: acceptability and privacy

```{r}
levels_accept <- c(
  "Not acceptable at all",
  "Not very acceptable",
  "Somewhat acceptable",
  "Very acceptable"
)

data_all <- data_all %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(acceptability_vars),
                ~ factor(.x, levels = levels_accept, ordered = TRUE)))

levels_privacy <- c(
  "Not concerned at all",
  "Not very concerned",
  "Somewhat concerned",
  "Very concerned"
)

data_all <- data_all %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(privacy_vars),
                ~ factor(.x, levels = levels_privacy, ordered = TRUE)))
```

## Demographics

```{r}
data_all <- data_all %>%
  mutate(
    age = as.integer(age),

    # ensure gender is consistent
    gender = tolower(as.character(gender)),

    # education as ordered factor
    education = ordered(education, levels = c("no", "low", "medium", "high")),

    # collapsed into three levels for analysis
    education_split = forcats::fct_collapse(
      education,
      low    = c("no", "low"),
      medium = "medium",
      high   = "high"
    ) %>% ordered(levels = c("low", "medium", "high"))
  )
```

## Political ideology

```{r}
data_all <- data_all %>%
  mutate(
    political = as.character(political),

    # numeric 0-1 version (strip label text before converting)
    political_num = (as.numeric(gsub(" .*", "", political)) - 1) / (7 - 1),

    # collapsed into left / centre / right
    political_split = forcats::fct_collapse(
      political,
      left   = c("1 (left-wing)", "2", "3"),
      centre = "4 (center)",
      right  = c("5", "6", "7 (right-wing)")
    ) %>% ordered(levels = c("left", "centre", "right"))
  )
```

## Save bundle

```{r}
if (!dir.exists("data")) dir.create("data")

bundle <- list(
  data_all            = data_all,
  dict                = items,
  acceptability_vars  = acceptability_vars,
  accept_service_vars = accept_service_vars,
  accept_info_vars    = accept_info_vars,
  accept_data_vars    = accept_data_vars,
  privacy_vars        = privacy_vars,
  country_var         = "country_code"
)

saveRDS(bundle, "data/bundle.rds")

cat("Saved bundle to data/bundle.rds\n")
cat("N rows:", nrow(data_all), "\n")
cat("Acceptability items:", length(acceptability_vars), "\n")
cat("Privacy concern items:", length(privacy_vars), "\n")
```
